```{echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
  filter(Visual_quality_score == "H") %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  pull(sound.files)
  
head(site_calls)

# Filter the full EST by these calls
tmp_est <- nat_inv_est[grep(paste(paste("^", site_calls, "$", sep = ""), collapse = "|"), nat_inv_est$sound.files), ]
nrow(tmp_est)
class(tmp_est)

# Make spectrograms with axis labels, inner.mar helps cut out the axis titles
specreator(tmp_est, flim = c(1, 8), ovlp = 90, mar = 0.01, res = 300, path = gpath, osci = FALSE, parallel = cores, line = FALSE, title.labels = NULL, axisX = FALSE, axisY = FALSE, inner.mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), wl = 378)

imgs <- c(
  "2019_08_06_ELEM_GSV1033_7.WAV",
  "2019_08_06_ELEM_GSV1024_8.WAV",
  "2019_08_06_ELEM_GSV1024_11.WAV",
  "2019_08_06_ELEM_GSV1029_3.WAV",
  "2019_08_08_INTR_1080_5.WAV",
  "2019_08_08_INTR_1088_2.WAV",
  "2019_08_08_INTR_1094_21.WAV",
  "2019_08_08_INTR_1094_33.WAV",
  "2019_08_10_MART_1142_1.WAV",
  "2019_08_10_MART_1147_2.WAV",
  "2019_08_10_MART_1161_6.WAV",
  "2019_08_10_MART_1163_1.WAV"
 )

# Resize images to 430 pixels wide by 285 pixels high, ignore aspect ratio
# Leaves enough space for adding a colored border around each image file
invisible(pblapply(1:length(imgs), function(i){
  
  img <- image_read(file.path(gpath, paste(imgs[i], "-1.jpeg", sep = "")))
  image_write(image_scale(img, geometry = "435x300!"), path = file.path(gpath, paste(imgs[i], "sm.jpeg", sep = "_")))
  
}))

```

Used the magick package to make a GIF after adding these acoustic space plots to lexicons
```{r echo = TRUE, echo = TRUE}

#################################
# Native range, individual scale

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "TwitterTO_Native_IndivScale_LexiconTraitSpace", full.names = TRUE)
img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "NativeRange_IndivScale.gif"))


#################################
# Native range, site scale

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "TwitterTO_Native_SiteScale_LexiconTraitSpace", full.names = TRUE)
img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "NativeRange_SiteScale.gif"))

#################################
# Invasive range, individual scale

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "TwitterTO_Invasive_IndivScale_LexiconTraitSpace", full.names = TRUE)
img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "InvasiveRange_IndivScale.gif"))


#################################
# Invasive range, site scale

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "TwitterTO_Invasive_SiteScale_LexiconTraitSpace", full.names = TRUE)
img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "InvasiveRange_SiteScale.gif"))


#################################
# Conceptual visual, FM

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "ConceptualVisual_FM", full.names = TRUE)
imgs

img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "ConceptualVisual_FM.gif"))


#################################
# RF acoustic space and FM visual

# List file names and read in
imgs <- list.files(twt_path, pattern = "RFKernelDensity_FreqMod", full.names = TRUE)
imgs

img_list <- lapply(imgs, image_read)

# Join images and add the last image twice so that it stays on longer
img_joined <- image_join(img_list, img_list[[length(img_list)]])

# Animate at 1 frames per second
img_animated <- image_animate(img_joined, fps = 1)

# View animated image
# img_animated

# Save to disk
image_write(image = img_animated,
            path = file.path(twt_path, "RFKernelDensity_FreqMod.gif"))

```

Dynamic spectrograms, Marcelo's new package dynaSpec.
```{r echo = TRUE, eval = TRUE}

?scrolling_spectro

wav_nm <- "/media/owner/MYIOPSITTA/R/Uruguay2017_MonkParakeet_CallAnalysis/Data/Site_Recordings/2017_07_28_ECIL-02_1181.WAV"

wav <- readWave(wav_nm, from = 2.8, to = 4.5, units = "seconds")
wav

scrolling_spectro(wav, file.name = file.path(twt_path, "2017_07_28_ECIL-02_1181_scrollSpectro.mp4"), flim = c(1, 6), collevels = seq(-40, 0, 5), ovlp = 90, colbg = "black", pal = magma, lower.spectro = FALSE, grid = FALSE, axis.type = "none", loop = 1, buffer = 0)

wav <- readWave(wav_nm, from = 2.8, to = 4.5, units = "seconds")
wav

scrolling_spectro(wav, file.name = file.path(twt_path, "2017_07_28_ECIL-02_1181_scrollSpectro_quarterSpeed.mp4"), flim = c(1, 6), collevels = seq(-40, 0, 5), ovlp = 90, colbg = "black", pal = magma, lower.spectro = FALSE, grid = FALSE, axis.type = "none", loop = 1, speed = 0.25, buffer = 0)

```


######################################

Sampling maps for defense and other talks.

Native and invasive range sampling. This code needs to be updated (see scalebar code below)
```{r echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE}

# Make western hemisphere vocal sampling map with state/country polygons filled in,

n <- 12
states <- map_data("state") %>%
  filter(region %in% c("texas", "louisiana", "florida", "connecticut"))
str(states)

ury <- map_data("world") %>%
  filter(region %in% c("Uruguay"))
str(ury)

world <- map_data("world")

gg_wrld <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "gray65") +
  geom_polygon(data = states, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = heat.colors(n)[5]) +
  geom_polygon(data = ury, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = topo.colors(n)[2]) +
  xlab("Longitude (Decimal Degrees)") + ylab("Latitude (Decimal Degrees)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 18), axis.text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-170, -30))

gg_wrld <- gg_wrld +
  scalebar(x.min = -150, x.max = -100, y.min = -50, y.max = -20, dist = 1500, dd2km = TRUE, model = "WGS84", height = 0.15, st.size = 2.5, st.dist = 0.15)

# gg_wrld

buf <- 0.1
symbol <- 1
symbol <- sprintf("%02.f", symbol)
symbol <- readPNG(paste0(system.file("symbols", package = "ggsn"), 
                         "/", symbol, ".png"))
symbol <- rasterGrob(symbol, interpolate = TRUE)
gg_wrld <- gg_wrld + annotation_custom(grob = symbol, xmin = -114, xmax = -124, 
                                       ymin = -30, ymax = -10)

gg_wrld

ggsave(file.path(gpath, "CulturalEvo_Map.jpeg"), units = "cm", width = 10, height = 14, dpi = 200) 


```

Native range sampling only.
```{r echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE}

n <- 12

ury <- map_data("world") %>%
  filter(region %in% c("Uruguay"))
str(ury)

world <- map_data("world")

gg_wrld <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "gray65") +
  geom_polygon(data = ury, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "navy") +
  xlab("Longitude (Decimal Degrees)") + ylab("Latitude (Decimal Degrees)") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-90, -35), ylim = c(-50, 20)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14), 
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.border = element_rect(size = 0.75),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) 

# gg_wrld

gg_wrld <- gg_wrld +
  scalebar(x.min = -60, x.max = -40, y.min = -45, y.max = -20, dist = 500, model = "WGS84", height = 0.05, st.size = 2.5, st.dist = 0.05, transform = TRUE, dist_unit = "km", border.size = 0.15)

gg_wrld

buf <- 0.1
symbol <- 1
symbol <- sprintf("%02.f", symbol)
symbol <- readPNG(paste0(system.file("symbols", package = "ggsn"), 
                         "/", symbol, ".png"))
symbol <- rasterGrob(symbol, interpolate = TRUE)
gg_wrld <- gg_wrld + annotation_custom(grob = symbol, xmin = -50, xmax = -40, 
                                       ymin = -40, ymax = -35)

gg_wrld

ggsave(file.path(gpath, "NativeRangeVocal_SamplingMap.jpeg"), units = "in", width = 3.5, height = 5, dpi = 200) 


```
